metadata.title: Codecks MCP Server Evaluation
metadata.description: Comprehensive evaluation of Codecks MCP server tools covering read-only operations

qa_pair.question: What is the ID and name of the currently authenticated user in the Codecks account?
qa_pair.notes: Tests basic user authentication and identity retrieval

qa_pair.question: How many active (non-deleted, non-archived) projects exist in the account?
List all project names and their visibility status. What visibility values appear in the results?
qa_pair.notes: Tests comprehensive project listing with all visibility states

qa_pair.question: What are the names of all decks in the account across all projects?
qa_pair.notes: Tests deck listing without project filter

qa_pair.question: How many cards are currently in 'started' status?
What is the title and current status of the most recently updated card?
qa_pair.notes: Tests card ordering and pagination (default order is -lastUpdatedAt)

qa_pair.question: List all milestones and their due dates. Which milestone has the earliest due date?
qa_pair.notes: Tests milestone listing and date comparison

qa_pair.question: For the first project in the account, what is its name and how many spaces does it have?
qa_pair.notes: Tests project detail retrieval using ID from list operation

qa_pair.question: What deck contains the most recently created card, and what is that deck's name?
qa_pair.notes: Tests card-to-deck relationship and multi-step lookup

qa_pair.question: How many total cards exist across all decks in the account?
qa_pair.notes: Tests card counting with pagination awareness
